settings.code:
{% for item in cart.items %}
Back to {{ item.product.title }}
{% endfor %}

settings.message: You are ||amount|| away from free shipping

settings.code: Easy returns & exchanges. See our Return Policy. Need help? Contact us or email info@golfprintclub.com.
Shipping and taxes are calculated at checkout

custom_css: .back-to-product-btn {display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; color: #000; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; padding-bottom: 2px; margin-bottom: 20px; transition: all 0.25s ease;}

settings.code:
<style>
.cart-remove .icon {
   stroke:black;
}

min-width:92vw;}
.cart__empty p {
    margin: 30vh 0;
font-size: 30px;

font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);

font-weight:700;
}

background: #D1D1D1;
}

    border-top: 0px;

}

    }

}

}

}

}

}

}

  	font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    	letter-spacing: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
	font-size: 12px; 
    	line-height: 1;
    	margin: .0em 0;
    	text-transform: var(--FONT-UPPERCASE-HEADING, none);
	align-items: center;
	font-size: 12px; 
	font-weight: 100;
}

.cart__item__title,  .cart__item__meta p, .cart__price, .cart__total__label, .cart__total__price, .grid__heading{
	text-transform: uppercase !important;
	font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  	font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  	font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    	letter-spacing: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
}

text-align: left;

font-size: 16px !important;

aspect-ratio: 4 / 5;

}
}

width:90vw;

padding-bottom: 20px;

}

.grid__heading {
text-align: left;

.cart__item__title, .grid__heading {
font-size: 16px !important;

.cart__item__meta p, .cart__total__label {

.sub {
	font-size: 10px !important;

.cart__item__image a {
    width: 150px;
    height: auto;
}


img{
aspect-ratio: 4 / 5;
}

.cart__item__content
 {
    width: auto;
    padding-left: 20px;
}

.cart__payment-icons {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 5px;
    list-style: none;
    margin: 0;
    padding: var(--inner) 0;
    justify-content: center;
}

 /* Make the cart row a 2-column grid:
     [image] [content]
     [  .  ] [discount]   */
  .cart__item{
    display:grid !important;
    grid-template-columns: 180px 1fr;     /* match your img width */
    grid-template-areas:
      "image content"
      ".     discount";
    column-gap:20px;
    align-items:start;
  }

  /* Place children into grid areas */
  .cart__item__image{ grid-area:image; }
  .cart__item__content{ grid-area:content; width:100%; }
  .cart__discount{
    grid-area:discount;
    margin-top:8px;
    text-align:left;
  }

  /* Ensure image behaves */
  .cart__item__image img{
    width:100%; height:auto; display:block; object-fit:cover;
    border-radius:6px; /* optional */
  }

  /* ---- Inside the content block: forced vertical stack ---- */
  .cart__item__content{
    display:flex !important;
    flex-direction:column !important;  /* Title → Price → Controls */
    align-items:flex-start !important; /* left align everything */
    gap:6px;
    text-align:right;
  }

  /* Order the children explicitly */
  .cart__item__content-inner{ order:1; min-width:0; }
  .cart__price{ 
    order:2; 
    text-align:right !important; 
    margin:2px 0 0; 
    display:block;
  }
  quantity-counter{
    order:3;
    display:flex !important;
    align-items:left;
    gap:10px;
    align-self:flex-start;
    margin-top:4px;
  }

  /* Controls formatting */
  .cart-remove{
    display:inline-flex !important;
    align-items:center;
    margin:0 10px 0 0 !important;
  }
  .cart__quantity{
    display:flex !important;
    align-items:center;
    gap:6px;
    justify-content:flex-start;
  }
  .cart__quantity label{ margin:0; }
  .cart__quantity-dropdown{ min-width:60px; text-align:left; }

  /* Safety: neutralize any floats/widths from the theme */
  .cart__item__content > *,
  .cart__item > *{
    float:none !important;
    max-width:100%;
  }

.cart__item{
    display:grid !important;
    grid-template-columns: 220px 1fr;   /* widen image column so text never overlaps */
    grid-template-areas:
      "image content"
      ".     discount";
    column-gap:10px;                    /* 10px gap between image + content */
    align-items:start;
  }

  .cart__item__image{
    grid-area:image;
    max-width:220px;                    /* lock image container width */
  }
  .cart__item__image img{
    width:100%;
    height:auto;
    max-height:400px;                   /* keep consistent 4:5 ratio */
    object-fit:cover;
    display:block;
  }

  .cart__item__content{
    grid-area:content;
    padding-left:100px;                  /* extra breathing space */
    display:flex !important;
    flex-direction:column !important;
    align-items:flex-start !important;
    gap:6px;
    text-align:right;
  }

  .cart__discount{
    grid-area:discount;
    margin-top:8px;
    padding-left:10px;                  /* align with content */
    text-align:right;
  }

.cart__items .cart__item__content {
    justify-content: center;
}

.cart__items {
    width: auto;
}

.cart__items .cart__price {
    width: calc(60vw - 320px);
max-width: 1080px;
}

.cart__items .cart__item__content-inner {
    width: calc(60vw - 330px);
max-width: 1070px;
}
}


</style>
